results.title: Browser Buddy: An AI buddy that finds you thoughtful quotes and essays  | Product Hunt
results.content:
Browser Buddy is a feed that curates this interesting, thought-provoking writing for you from across the Internet. We’re excited for you to try it out, download from the app store here!

For any questions, shoot me an email @ jeremy@browserbuddy.com

Arnav Wadehra
Browser Buddy

Browser Buddy

Here are some example recommendations:

“I’m trying to grow my early stage consumer internet company”:

“I want to learn how to build beautiful web interfaces”:

“Teach me the history of the Internet”:

“I’m trying to read more about games and game theory”:

“I’ve been getting into network science and network theory”: 

CHRISTIAN ONOCHIE

Finally, something to help me sound smarter on dates without spending 4 hours on obscure blogs 😂 Love this!

Jeremy Suh
Browser Buddy

Browser Buddy [...] Browser Buddy
